.github/workflows/codeql-analysis.yml.general_idea: Update the CodeQL analysis workflow to use JDK 21 instead of JDK 17 to match the project's target runtime.

.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 21 instead of JDK 17 for the build environment.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Replace the deprecated Spring Security annotation EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with the new EnableMethodSecurity annotation required for Spring Security 6+.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.why_exists: EnableGlobalMethodSecurity was removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes a compile error (class not found) on Spring Boot 3.x.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Migrate persistence API import from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.why_exists: The javax.persistence package is no longer available in Jakarta EE 9+ compliant libraries (like Hibernate 6 used by Spring Boot 3), causing a compile-time 'package not found' error.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with SecurityFilterChain beans for REST security configuration.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7+ and removed in Spring Security 6 (Spring Boot 3.x); code fails to compile without replacement.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.before: public static class RestSecurityConfigurationAdapter extends WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter { ... @Override public void configure(HttpSecurity http) ... }

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with SecurityFilterChain beans for App security configuration.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7+ and removed in Spring Security 6 (Spring Boot 3.x); code fails to compile without replacement.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.before: public static class AppSecurityConfigurerAdapter extends WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter { ... @Override protected void configure(HttpSecurity http) ... }

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter WebSecurity configuration with WebSecurityCustomizer bean.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7+ and removed in Spring Security 6 (Spring Boot 3.x); code fails to compile without replacement.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.before: @Override public void configure(WebSecurity web) throws Exception { web.ignoring().antMatchers(...); }

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Update HttpSecurity DSL to use lambda-based configuration and requestMatchers instead of antMatchers.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.why_exists: antMatchers is deprecated in Spring Security 6 and removed; HttpSecurity methods like authorizeRequests are replaced by authorizeHttpRequests with lambda support. Code fails to compile without update.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Update session management configuration to use lambda-based DSL.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.why_exists: The fluent builder style with .and() is removed in Spring Security 6; sessionManagement now requires lambda configuration. Code fails to compile without update.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Update OAuth2 Resource Server JWT configuration to use lambda-based DSL and withDefaults.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.why_exists: The fluent builder style for oauth2ResourceServer is removed in Spring Security 6; jwt() configuration now uses lambda and withDefaults(). Code fails to compile without update.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Update CSRF configuration to use lambda-based DSL and ignoringRequestMatchers.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.why_exists: ignoringAntMatchers is deprecated/removed in Spring Security 6; csrf configuration now uses lambda and ignoringRequestMatchers(). Code fails to compile without update.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Update LTI13Configurer application to use http.with() with lambda instead of http.apply().
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.why_exists: http.apply() is removed in Spring Security 6; custom configurers must be applied via http.with() with a lambda or withDefaults(). Code fails to compile without update.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Update WebSecurity ignoring configuration to use requestMatchers instead of antMatchers.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.why_exists: antMatchers is removed in Spring Security 6; WebSecurity ignoring must use requestMatchers(). Code fails to compile without update.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Update import path for GroupedOpenApi to reflect package restructuring in newer SpringDoc OpenAPI versions.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.why_exists: Class not found compile error because GroupedOpenApi was moved from org.springdoc.core to org.springdoc.core.models in recent SpringDoc releases.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Migrate servlet API import from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3 and Java 21.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.servlet.http does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; the class HttpSession is now located in jakarta.servlet.http.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Migrate servlet API import from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.why_exists: Import statement 'javax.servlet.http.HttpSession' will fail to resolve because the javax.servlet package was removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and replaced by jakarta.servlet.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Migrate servlet API import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.servlet.http does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3+).

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet import with jakarta.servlet to align with Jakarta EE namespace used in Spring Boot 3.x and Java 21 environments.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.servlet does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3.x).

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.x and Java 21.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.why_exists: Compilation failure: the javax.persistence package is no longer available in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; classes using these annotations will fail to compile or load at runtime without the jakarta.persistence equivalents.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.why_exists: The javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; using it causes ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime.
